sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79995" key="pata/neyis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰτάνεψις</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[τᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n79995.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">an eel dressed in a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πατάνη</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:211" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">211</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
